agents.name: Intake
agents.role: Parses employee request in plain language and structures the brief

agents.name: Search
agents.role: Retrieves on-brand assets and brand guidelines using embeddings

agents.name: Brush
agents.role: Generates or adapts content (copy and imagery) to brand specifications

agents.name: Route
agents.role: Routes finalised brief or asset to the correct downstream owner (Marcom, OpCo lead)

agents.name: Validator
agents.role: Scores output against brand rules, triggers revision loop if below threshold
